title: senecio amboinicus
intro: Senecio amboinicus, also known as Mexican mint or Polymnia, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Senecio amboinicus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in folk medicine for centuries.
